name: New patient speed-to-lead: SMS then book + email confirm
description: When a new-patient intake form is submitted, text the lead within 2 minutes to thank them by name, have a short SMS conversation to confirm insurance and capture preferred time, book them into the next new-patient consultation, then email a confirmation with the clinic address.

steps.initial_message: Hi {{first_name}}, it's Bright Smile Dental 🦷 Thanks so much for reaching out — we're glad you did. No pressure at all, just wanted to say hi and help get you in for your free new-patient consultation. When would work best for you to come in? Also, quick one: do you have dental insurance, or would you rather we sort that out in person?
steps.exit_when: The patient has shared a preferred day/time window AND confirmed whether they have insurance (yes / no / unsure).

extract.preferred_time_iso: The patient's preferred appointment start time, resolved to an ISO 8601 datetime in the clinic's local timezone. If they gave a vague window, pick the earliest reasonable slot inside it.
extract.has_insurance: One of 'yes' | 'no' | 'unsure' based on the patient's reply.

args.subject: You're booked, {{first_name}} — see you soon at Bright Smile Dental
args.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

You're all set for your free new-patient consultation at Bright Smile Dental on {{preferred_time_iso}}. It's a relaxed 45-minute visit — no drills, no pressure, just a chance to meet the team and talk through what you need.

Where to find us:
Bright Smile Dental
(Our clinic address will be shared here — please reply to this email if you need directions or parking info.)

A few gentle notes:
• If anything changes, just reply to this email or text us back and we'll reschedule, no problem.
• Insurance on file: {{has_insurance}}. If that changes before your visit, let us know and we'll handle the rest.
• Feel free to arrive 5 minutes early so we can get you comfy.

We're really looking forward to meeting you.

Warmly,
The Bright Smile Dental team
